name: react-codemod
description: A collection of codemods to help update React apps

scripts.test:legacy: bash -lc 'cd codemods/legacy && pnpm install --ignore-workspace --frozen-lockfile --force && pnpm run test:ci'
scripts.ci: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:active && pnpm run check-types:active && pnpm run test:legacy
